chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-3763 of 2023 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of Misc.No.17253/2023 2.For hearing of main case. 14.03.2025 Mr.Shahbakht Pirzada, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Amir Ali, Mr.Pervaiz Ahmed Memon and Mr.M.Bilal Bhati, Advocates for the Respondent (F.B.R) Parawise comments filed on behalf of Respondent Nos.2 & 4 is taken on record and copy of the same has been supplied to petitioner’s counsel. This petition was predicated on the assertion that a demand notice has been issued without any show cause etc. It is jointly submitted that subsequently a show cause notice was issued and the adjudication went upto the tribunal stage where the judgment was rendered in favour of the petitioner. In view of the foregoing learned counsel for the respondent (F.B.R) states that demand notice has ceased to be of any effect and may be treated as withdrawn, subject to the right of the respondent emanating from the outcome of SCRA pending. In view of the above, learned counsel for the petitioner states that this petition appears to have served its purpose, hence, it may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
